title: orchis × angusticruris var. pseudomilitaris
intro: Orchis × angusticruris var. pseudomilitaris is a rare and unique orchid plant, often referred to as a hybrid of the bee orchid and the soldier orchid. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Orchis × angusticruris var. pseudomilitaris include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant include dried root powder, decoctions, and infusions, which can be used in teas, tinctures, or other medicinal formulations.
